title: Author Correction: Selective manipulation of the inositol metabolic pathway for induction of salt-tolerance in indica rice variety

errors.description: The error is that the figures and related text incorrectly refer to a 10-day salination stress period, when the actual experiments and data presented are based on a 7-day stress period, leading to a mismatch between the reported experimental timeline and what was actually performed.

The figure and its legend incorrectly state that the salination stress period was 10 days, when in fact the data and experiments were conducted over a 7-day stress period, leading to inconsistency between the text and the figure.
